title: BLD-427: Empty-result run ID and follow-up suggestion
description: Adds run-ID display and follow-up command suggestion when hlx tickets artifacts returns no results

steps.title: Local TicketDetail and TicketResponse types
steps.description: Added local type declarations matching the established convention in artifact.ts and bundle.ts. These are needed for the ticket-detail fetch that resolves the run ID.

steps.title: Combined empty-result check
steps.description: New block checks if both items and stepArtifactSummary are empty. Only then does run-ID resolution and follow-up output trigger. This preserves the success path byte-identically.

steps.title: Narrowly-scoped resolvedRunId variable
steps.description: Declares let resolvedRunId initialized from the existing const runId (line 26). If the user supplied --run, this value is used directly (AC 2). Otherwise, the ticket-detail fetch resolves it.

steps.title: Ticket-detail fetch with try/catch
steps.description: When --run is not supplied, fetches ticket detail to resolve the run ID. Wrapped in try/catch per failure behavior spec: on error, prints a graceful note and returns normally (exit 0, no throw, no retry).

steps.title: No-runs handling
steps.description: If the ticket has no currentRun and no runs array entries, prints 'No runs available for this ticket.' and returns without a follow-up suggestion (AC 4).

steps.title: Run ID and follow-up suggestion output
steps.description: Prints the resolved run ID and the follow-up command template. Only the run ID is a concrete value; ticket-ref, stepId, and repoKey remain as placeholders.
